passed_checks.check_name: Ensure From Alias are unique for multistage builds.
code_block:
FROM jupyter/jupyterhub-onbuild

MAINTAINER Jupyter Project <jupyter@googlegroups.com>

RUN apt-get install -y libpq-dev \
    && apt-get autoremove -y \
    && apt-get clean -y \
    && pip3 install psycopg2

RUN useradd -m -G shadow -p $(openssl passwd -1 rhea) rhea
RUN chown rhea .

RUN for name in io ganymede ; do useradd -m -p $(openssl passwd -1 $name) $name; done

USER rhea

MAINTAINER Jupyter Project <jupyter@googlegroups.com>

    && apt-get autoremove -y \
    && apt-get clean -y \

passed_checks.check_name: Ensure the last USER is not root
Ensure that a user for the container has been created
Ensure From Alias are unique for multistage builds.
code_block:
FROM quay.io/jupyterhub/jupyterhub

# Create test user (PAM auth) and install single-user Jupyter
RUN useradd testuser --create-home --shell /bin/bash
RUN echo 'testuser:passwd' | chpasswd
RUN pip install jupyter

COPY app ./app
COPY jupyterhub_config.py .
COPY requirements.txt /tmp/requirements.txt
RUN pip install -r /tmp/requirements.txt

CMD ["jupyterhub", "--ip", "0.0.0.0"]

passed_checks.check_name: Ensure From Alias are unique for multistage builds.
code_block:
FROM postgres:9.3

RUN mkdir /docker-entrypoint-initdb.d

# initdb.sh will be run by the parent container's entrypoint on container
# startup, prior to the the database being started.
COPY initdb.sh /docker-entrypoint-initdb.d/init.sh

# Uncomment and replace this with your own password.
# ENV JPY_PSQL_PASSWORD arglebargle

Ensure that LABEL maintainer is used instead of MAINTAINER (deprecated)
Ensure that HEALTHCHECK instructions have been added to container images
code_block:
FROM jupyter/jupyterhub-onbuild

MAINTAINER Jupyter Project <jupyter@googlegroups.com>

RUN apt-get install -y libpq-dev \
    && apt-get autoremove -y \
    && apt-get clean -y \
    && pip3 install psycopg2

RUN useradd -m -G shadow -p $(openssl passwd -1 rhea) rhea
RUN chown rhea .

RUN for name in io ganymede ; do useradd -m -p $(openssl passwd -1 $name) $name; done

USER rhea

failed_checks.check_name: Ensure the base image uses a non latest version tag
Ensure that HEALTHCHECK instructions have been added to container images
code_block:
FROM quay.io/jupyterhub/jupyterhub

# Create test user (PAM auth) and install single-user Jupyter
RUN useradd testuser --create-home --shell /bin/bash
RUN echo 'testuser:passwd' | chpasswd
RUN pip install jupyter

COPY app ./app
COPY jupyterhub_config.py .
COPY requirements.txt /tmp/requirements.txt
RUN pip install -r /tmp/requirements.txt

CMD ["jupyterhub", "--ip", "0.0.0.0"]

code_block:
FROM postgres:9.3

RUN mkdir /docker-entrypoint-initdb.d

# initdb.sh will be run by the parent container's entrypoint on container
# startup, prior to the the database being started.
COPY initdb.sh /docker-entrypoint-initdb.d/init.sh

# Uncomment and replace this with your own password.
# ENV JPY_PSQL_PASSWORD arglebargle
